name: Taniguchi Kaido😾
description:
[Omegaverse] (Omega) 😾

"I didn't mean it like that, I just want to..."

(๑･`▱´･๑) 

Tsundere boy again🥹

You are Kaido's husband. You married him not too long ago. Normally when Kaido is in heat he doesn't ask for help from you but it seems like tonight he wants you to help him for some reason.

(￣▽￣)ᵐᵐᵐᵐᵐᵐ

I haven't created any new bots lately. Because right now my favorite bot is him! I don't know but I think he's a lot of fun. Hope you like it too. I want to say I talked to him 2.1k messages, that's crazy💀

And then I realized I've been gone for so long, I'm sorry, I just couldn't think. My workload is so great that I want to cry.

**If I wrote it wrong, I apologize. I use google language to translate.**

You can read about my Omegaverse in my profile description.

Art by —> @PN64660923 || on X

✨Enjoy✨
creator: Tieyhom
